description_long: This is a sleek, modern aircraft with a streamlined, low-profile fuselage and a pair of broad, swept-back wings mounted mid-fuselage. The aircraft features a prominent main rotor and tail rotor, suggesting a hybrid helicopter-airplane design, with the main rotor blades extending widely from the center. The nose is sharply pointed, and the cockpit is positioned at the front, with a slightly raised canopy for visibility. The body is predominantly black with subtle surface detailing, and the overall design emphasizes stealth and aerodynamic efficiency. The landing gear is not visibly extended, indicating a possible retractable configuration integrated into the fuselage.
description: A black, streamlined aircraft with swept-back mid-mounted wings and a prominent main rotor, featuring a pointed nose and forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, and the main rotor blades extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the X-shaped main rotor and the symmetrical wing layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the rotor and streamlined body.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tapering fuselage, tail section, and the full span of the main rotor.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with broad, swept-back wings and no visible winglets; main rotor blades extend outward in an X-pattern.
attribute_engine_type: Single main rotor with no visible external jet or turboprop engines; likely rotorcraft propulsion.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer integrated into the tail section.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, not visibly extended in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a slightly raised canopy at the front of the fuselage.
